title: Doodle Pop
description: Un style d'illustration éditoriale ludique et énergique, caractérisé par des contours audacieux à l'encre noire d'épaisseur variable et des aplats de couleurs à palette limitée. La composition déborde d'énergie cinétique, utilisant des gribouillis abstraits flottants, des lignes d'action et des éléments typographiques qui entourent le point focal central aux côtés de motifs géométriques audacieux et de rayures diagonales très contrastées.
prompt: Digital editorial illustration, playful doodle art style, crisp vector-like line art with hand-drawn organic imperfections. The composition features a highly stylized, flat 2D execution where the {{subject}} is rendered with bold, variable-width black ink contours. These outlines are confident and dynamic, featuring tapered strokes that give a lively, hand-drawn aesthetic to the otherwise clean digital medium. The {{subject}} is central, surrounded by a chaotic yet perfectly balanced array of floating kinetic elements, abstract squiggles, action lines, radiating dashes, and playful typographic fragments that inject immense kinetic energy into the scene. The color science relies on a strictly limited, high-contrast palette. Flat color blocking is utilized throughout, featuring {{primary_color}} as the dominant hue for solid fills, complemented by {{accent_color}} applied to striking graphic patterns, all grounded by a solid {{secondary_color}} base tone. There are absolutely no gradients, no soft shading, and no highlights; volume and spatial dynamics are implied purely through the overlapping of flat planes and the interplay of thick and thin contour lines. Surrounding the {{subject}} are bold geometric shapes, including prominent high-contrast diagonal stripes and stylized organic botanical forms that overlap to create a sense of flat, forced 2D depth. The texture is mostly clean and graphic, with only a microscopic, warm paper grain subtly unifying the solid fills. The lighting anatomy is completely flat, devoid of any directional light source, relying entirely on graphic contrast. The edge treatment consists of hard, vector-cut silhouettes encapsulated by the bold ink lines. The image MUST occupy the absolute ENTIRE dedicated space: NO borders, NO frames, NO white margins, NO canvas edges, FULL BLEED to all four corners, the environment must stretch entirely across the canvas. Tags: digital editorial illustration, doodle art, flat line art, kinetic squiggles, variable-width ink, geometric patterns, limited palette, 2D vector style, hand-drawn typography, high-contrast stripes, full bleed, edge-to-edge, no border, no frame, no canvas, occupying entire space
background_prompt: A purely environmental backdrop in a playful editorial doodle art style. A flat 2D composition featuring bold geometric shapes, high-contrast diagonal stripes, and stylized organic botanical shapes overlapping to create flat depth. Floating kinetic elements, abstract squiggles, action lines, and radiating dashes are scattered across the space. The color palette is highly restricted, utilizing {{primary_color}} for dominant shape fills, {{accent_color}} for striking graphic patterns, and a solid {{secondary_color}} base tone. Crisp, variable-width black ink contours define the shapes, with clean solid fills and absolutely no gradients or shading, supported by a very subtle underlying paper grain texture. No frames, no borders, spanning the entire canvas.
description_en: A playful and energetic editorial illustration style characterized by bold, variable-width black ink contours and flat, limited-palette color blocks. The composition bursts with kinetic energy, utilizing floating abstract squiggles, action lines, and typographic elements that surround the central focus alongside bold geometric patterns and high-contrast diagonal stripes.

background_prompt_removebg: A purely environmental backdrop in a playful editorial doodle art style, rendered against a flat {{background_color}} backdrop. A decorative foreground frame made of floating abstract squiggles, action lines, radiating dashes, and bold geometric shapes with high-contrast diagonal stripes frames the invisible central subject area. Stylized organic botanical shapes overlap to create flat depth. The flat 2D elements transition cleanly into the {{background_color}} surface, creating a playful, layered border effect. The color palette uses {{primary_color}} for dominant shape fills, {{accent_color}} for striking graphic patterns, and a solid {{secondary_color}} for base elements, all sharply contrasting against the {{background_color}} with crisp, variable-width black ink contours and absolutely no gradients.
